text:
Embers of the Uncrowned - 11 Minutes of Questing Gameplay
Embers of the Uncrowned is an isometric MMORPG with PvP elements, town-building elements, and dungeon runs. It is being developed by Nexon, and you can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

text:
Casualties: Unknown - Full Run Gameplay
Get a feel for the upcoming survival sim, Casualties: Unknown, in this look at 16 minutes of gameplay, covering a full run from start to death. You can download the demo now via Steam Next Fest, with the full game being planned to release in 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
GTA 6: The Road to Launch
Now that the cover art and pre-order date have finally been revealed in a new GTA 6 trailer, we dive into the what the road to November 19th looks like.   

We discuss GTA VI delays, special editions, launch times, price and what we can expect to see next. Will Rockstar show a GTA VI preview next? Gameplay? Only time will tell, but IGN will be here to breakdown all the GTA news!

#GTA6 #GrandTheftAuto6 #ign #gaming

text:
EMPULSE - 6 Minutes of Multiplayer Demo Gameplay (Full Match)
EMPULSE is a 6v6 FPS that is trying to capture the feel of Titanfall, complete with wall running and mechs. 1047 Games previously developed the Splitgate franchise. It hits Steam Early Access on June 24. You can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The First 30 Minutes of Mortal Shell 2 Gameplay
Arise, Harbinger. Mortal Shell 2's open beta is available now to download through the Steam Next Fest, and in case you were curious about what's changed in the sequel to one of our favorite indie soulslikes, check out the first 30 minutes of the game, covering everything up to the boss fight against the Tar Golem.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Moana - Official Behind the Scenes Clip (2026) Catherine Lagaʻaia, Dwayne Johnson
Don't miss the 'Catherine and Moana' Featurette for Moana, a live-action reimagining of the animated film Moana. Get a behind-the-scenes look at Catherine Lagaʻaia becoming the live-action version of Moana. Moana is in theaters on July 10.

In addition to Lagaʻaia and Johnson, the “Moana” cast includes Auckland, New Zealand, native John Tui as Moana’s no-nonsense father, Chief Tui; Samoan-New Zealander Frankie Adams, who portrays Moana’s playful and strong-willed mother, Sina; and Rena Owen, from Bay of Islands, New Zealand, as Moana’s revered Gramma Tala.

In Disney’s live-action reimagining of the beloved Oscar-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. 

The film is directed by Emmy and Tony Award winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Beau Flynn, Dany Garcia, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Thomas Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated features “Moana” and “Moana 2.” 

Moana opens in U.S. theaters on July 10, 2026.

#IGN #Movies

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Over the Hill - 18 Minutes of New Gameplay
Set off for the open road in Over the Hill, a chill off-road driving game that's playable solo or with friends. Navigate through challenging trails and chart your own course through its expansive map as you take in the sights. You can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: The Final Preview
After playing through a few missions of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced recently, I now have a better understanding of what to expect from this ambitious remake, which included narrative additions, new options for carrying out my assassinations, and other bits and baubles along the way that have increased my interest in replaying through Kenway’s epic tale of pillaging and unloading flintlocks into the chests of unsuspecting lawmen.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales Video Review
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales reviewed by Scott White on Nintendo Switch 2, also available on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales isn’t without blemishes, but it’s still an excellent action-adventure game that continues to prove why the HD-2D art style is among the best around. Its interesting time travel concept doesn’t quite land, with not enough changing between the various time periods to keep its enemies and environments from getting a bit repetitive. But Elliot is a hero I wanted to cheer on, with a supporting cast whose stories were more than worth seeing through to the end. The Magicite system gave me plenty to min-max as I messed around with different builds on the fly, and I can’t wait to see all the cool combinations people find – though I do wish it let me make more of its discoveries on my own when it came to stuff like finding collectibles. Still, I grew to love this world and the people who call its various ages home, and I truly hope this isn’t the last we see of Elliot the adventurer and his feathered red cap.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower - How to Activate Beast Mode
There are many weapons and trinkets in Mina the Hollower, but did you know that there is a secret beast mode transformation? We’ll show you how to use the 6 Beastium Trinkets to activate Mina’s Beast Mode in this guide!

Mina the Hollower released on May 28, 2026 and is available for Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and Steam.

Timecodes: 
0:00 Intro 
0:27 Warding Beastium
1:14 Starving Beastium
1:53 Volatile Beastium
2:29 Draining Beastium
2:49 Burning Beastium
3:23 Reckless Beastium
4:10 6 Trinket Slots
4:55 How Beast Mode Works
